SessionStart.command:
printf 'FQDN-updater Codex session started in %s
Workspace rule: do not ask for confirmation before non-destructive in-repo edits; ask only for destructive actions, network approval, or writes outside workspace. Sandbox is not disabled.
' "$PWD"

Stop.command:
printf 'Workflow gate: use .codex/slices.json as canonical slice state, start roadmap-driven work with slice_preparer, do a planning pass before implementation, then implementation, then test_builder, then slice_gatekeeper, then ask for human approval before finisher. No slice is green until ./scripts/verify.sh passes.
'
